title: SMP-Starter
description: A Datapack / Mod that simplifies the start of a Minecraft server through a small script that opens the world border, changes the game mode, and enables PvP.
body:
With this datapack/mod, administrators can define a spawn point for the server start and, using a simple command, set a world border, disable PvP, and switch all players to Adventure mode. When another command is executed, the world border resets to its original size with an animation, PvP is re-enabled, and all players are switched to Survival mode.

Anyone with the tag 'admin' will not be switched to any other game mode.

### Usage:
1. Put the file in the mods or datapack folder.
1. Start the World or Server.
1. Find a place where the Worldspawn should be.
1. Run /function smpstart:setup
1. Whitelist all your friends.
1. Run /function smpstart:startsmp 

Once the server start is finished, the mod/datapack can be removed without any problems.

If you find any bugs or have any datapack suggestions, please let me know on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/fy4KuxYKVD).

### Thanks
